title: Update fallback gold and silver prices

requirements.summary: Update the hardcoded fallback gold price to ₹1,70,000 per 10g (Gold 24K)
acceptanceCriteria: The fallback gold price is set to 170000 (₹1,70,000 per 10g) in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts.
When the IBJA API is unavailable, the dashboard and ticker display ₹1,70,000/10g for Gold 24K.

file_operations.description: Update the FALLBACK_GOLD_PRICE constant from 85500 to 170000 to reflect the new fallback rate of ₹1,70,000 per 10g for Gold 24K.

requirements.summary: Update the hardcoded fallback silver price to ₹3,09,000 per kg
acceptanceCriteria: The fallback silver price is set to 309000 (₹3,09,000 per kg) in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts.
When the IBJA API is unavailable, the dashboard and ticker display ₹3,09,000/kg for Silver.

file_operations.description: Update the FALLBACK_SILVER_PRICE constant from 96000 to 309000 to reflect the new fallback rate of ₹3,09,000 per kg for Silver.
